question.content: Solve the number-loop puzzle on the given grid: draw one closed, non-branching, non-crossing loop satisfying all adjacency counts around numbered cells. Output exactly one token SEE_STEP4, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no sentence, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Start from forced edges implied by strong numeric constraints and keep one continuous loop candidate.
step_1.key_point: Extract the key constraints before committing to the final choice.

step_3.content: Propagate continuity and parity constraints to remove impossible turns.
step_3.key_point: Each intermediate update must preserve single-loop feasibility.

step_5.content: Merge partial segments while preventing branches or crossings.
step_5.key_point: Dead ends are forbidden and must be pruned immediately.

step_7.content: Close the final loop and verify every numbered-cell condition.
step_7.key_point: Final loop is the one shown in the last step figure.
